overview.description: AI tools for cybersecurity compliance, customer support automation, and process automation
overview.description_long: Kraita (brand of Circles s.r.o.) builds AI-powered B2B products. Flagship product Kraita Cyber One helps companies achieve NIS2/NZoKB cybersecurity compliance using AI-generated analyses, ISMS documentation and asset management. Support Assistant is a RAG-based chatbot for websites. Automation product covers AI workflow automation using n8n, Make and Zapier. Part of Ambeat Group holding.
overview.tagline: AI nástroje, které zjednoduší složité procesy a udělají práci za vás

history.origin_story: Founded in February 2024 as Circles s.r.o., operating under the Kraita brand. Part of the Ambeat Group holding company. Focused initially on NIS2 cybersecurity compliance tooling, later expanding to chatbot and automation products.

key_milestones.event: Founded as Circles s.r.o. (IČO 21277371), Prague Municipal Court registry C 399397/MSPH
Launched Kraita Cyber One NIS2 compliance platform
Expanded product suite with Support Assistant, Knowledge Manager, and Automation

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Kraita's core products (RAG chatbot, NIS2 document generation, AI automation workflows) are built on top of standard LLM capabilities and open-source automation tools (n8n, Make, Zapier). The value proposition is thin enough that foundation models and commoditized AI platforms can easily replicate it.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: NIS2 cybersecurity compliance is a real regulatory-driven market in the EU with genuine demand, but the space is crowded with larger, more established players. The chatbot and automation markets are highly competitive with low switching costs.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Founded in February 2024 with no known external funding. Very small team (estimated <10 people). Revenue from monthly subscriptions (15,000–35,000 CZK/month per client) is nascent. Dependence on Ambeat Group parent for stability is unclear.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very early-stage startup (founded 2024) with no publicly known customers, no visible funding, and products that replicate capabilities available via commodity AI APIs. High AGI displacement and funding risks combine for an overall high risk profile.

metadata.notes: Legal entity is Circles s.r.o. (IČO: 21277371, registered Prague Municipal Court C 399397/MSPH). Brand name is Kraita. kraita.com is a parked domain; actual website is kraita.io. Company is part of Ambeat Group holding.
